---
title: "chi_square_tests"
format: pdf
---

This documents should be a clean document for all the chi-square tests we plan on doing for the statistical report

1.	Chi-square on race and income

2.	Chi square education and income

3.	Chi square on citizenship and income

4.	Chi square on race and citizenship

5.  Chi square on race and education

6.  Chi square on education and citizenship

```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(purrr)
library(survey)
library(srvyr)
library(broom)
library(gt)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)

data <- read_parquet("../data/clean_data.parquet")

glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
data_chi <- data %>% 
  #adults in the work force
  dplyr::filter(age > 18,
         esr != "Not in Labor Force"
         ) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(# Merge no schooling into less than high school before factoring
         education = case_when(
           education == "No schooling completed" ~ "Less than High School",
           TRUE ~ education
         ),
         cit_simp = ifelse(cit != "Not a U.S. citizen",
                                 "Citizen",
                                 "Non-Citizen"),
                cit_simp = factor(cit_simp,
                                  levels = c("Non-Citizen",
                                            "Citizen")),
         income_brackets = case_when(income_personal <= 15000 ~ "0-15k",
                                     income_personal <= 30000 ~ "15k-30k",
                                     income_personal <= 60000 ~ "30k-60k",
                                     income_personal <= 90000 ~ "60k-90k",
                                     income_personal <= 120000 ~ "90k-120k",
                                     income_personal <= 150000 ~ "120k-150k",
                                     income_personal > 150000 ~ "150k+")) %>% 
  dplyr::select(income_brackets, race_simp, cit_simp, education, pwgtp, pwgtp1:pwgtp80)

rep_weights <- paste0("pwgtp", 1:80)

acs_design <- data_chi %>%
  as_survey_rep(
    weights    = pwgtp,
    repweights = all_of(rep_weights),
    type       = "successive-difference",
    mse        = TRUE
)
```

### 1. Chi square: race : income

```{r}
race_inc_chi <- acs_design %>% 
  svychisq(formula = ~ race_simp + income_brackets,
           design = .,
           statistic = "Chisq",
           na.rm = TRUE)

race_inc_chi

race_inc_table <- race_inc_chi$observed %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  group_by(income_brackets) %>% 
  mutate(prop = round(n / sum (n), 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-n) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = race_simp, values_from = prop) %>% 
  mutate(income_brackets = factor(income_brackets,
                                  levels = c("0-15k",
                                             "15k-30k",
                                             "30k-60k",
                                             "60k-90k",
                                             "90k-120k",
                                             "120k-150k",
                                             "150k+"))) %>% 
  arrange(desc(income_brackets)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(income_brackets, Hispanic, White, Black, Asian, Other) %>% 
  gt(rowname_col = "income_brackets") %>% 
  tab_header(title = "Table 4: Chi-square: Income and Race") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Income") %>% 
  tab_spanner(label = "Race",
              columns = everything()) %>% 
  data_color(
    columns = Hispanic,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#4daf4a")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = White,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#377eb8")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = Black,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#984ea3")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = Asian,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#e41a1c")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = Other,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#ff7f00")) %>% 
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste0(
      "χ² = ", round(race_inc_chi$statistic, 2),
      ", p ", ifelse(race_inc_chi$p.value < 0.001, "< .001", 
                     paste0("= ", round(race_inc_chi$p.value, 3)))
    )
  ) 

race_inc_table

gtsave(race_inc_table,
       "../../statistical_report/race_inc_table.png")
```

### 2. Chi square: education : income

```{r}
edu_inc_chi <- acs_design %>% 
  svychisq(formula = ~ education + income_brackets,
           design = .,
           statistic = "Chisq",
           na.rm = TRUE)

race_inc_chi


edu_inc_table <- edu_inc_chi$observed %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  group_by(income_brackets, education) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    education = factor(education,
                       levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                                  "Doctorate degree",
                                  "Master's degree",
                                  "Bachelor's degree",
                                  "Associate's degree",
                                  "Some college",
                                  "Regular high school diploma",
                                  "GED or alternative credential",
                                  "Less than High School")),
    income_brackets = factor(income_brackets,
                             levels = c("0-15k",
                                        "15k-30k",
                                        "30k-60k",
                                        "60k-90k",
                                        "90k-120k",
                                        "120k-150k",
                                        "150k+"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(education) %>%
  mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n), 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-n) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = income_brackets,
              values_from = prop) %>%
  arrange(education) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    education,
    "0-15k", "15k-30k", "30k-60k", "60k-90k",
    "90k-120k", "120k-150k", "150k+"
  ) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "education") %>% 
  tab_header(title = "Table 5: Chi-square: Income and Education") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Education") %>% 
  tab_spanner(label = "Income Bracket",
              columns = everything()) %>% 
  data_color(
    columns = "0-15k",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#4daf4a")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = "15k-30k",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#377eb8")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = "30k-60k",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#984ea3")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = "60k-90k",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#e41a1c")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = "90k-120k",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#ff7f00")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = "120k-150k",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#a65628")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = "150k+",
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#1b9e77")
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste0(
      "χ² = ", round(edu_inc_chi$statistic, 2),
      ", p ", ifelse(edu_inc_chi$p.value < 0.001, "< .001", 
                     paste0("= ", round(edu_inc_chi$p.value, 3)))
    )
  )

edu_inc_table

gtsave(edu_inc_table,
       "../../statistical_report/edu_inc_table.png")
```

### 3. cit and income

```{r}
cit_inc_chi <- acs_design %>% 
  svychisq(formula = ~ cit_simp + income_brackets,
           design = .,
           statistic = "Chisq",
           na.rm = TRUE)

cit_inc_table <- cit_inc_chi$observed %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  group_by(income_brackets) %>% 
  mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n), 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-n) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = cit_simp, values_from = prop) %>% 
  mutate(income_brackets = factor(income_brackets,
                                  levels = c("0-15k",
                                             "15k-30k",
                                             "30k-60k",
                                             "60k-90k",
                                             "90k-120k",
                                             "120k-150k",
                                             "150k+"))) %>% 
  arrange(desc(income_brackets)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(income_brackets, Citizen, `Non-Citizen`) %>% 
  gt(rowname_col = "income_brackets") %>% 
  tab_header(title = "Table 7: Chi-square: Income and Citizenship") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Income") %>% 
  tab_spanner(label = "Citizenship", columns = everything()) %>% 
  data_color(
    columns = Citizen,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#4daf4a")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = `Non-Citizen`,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#377eb8")
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste0(
      "χ² = ", round(cit_inc_chi$statistic, 2),
      ", p ", ifelse(cit_inc_chi$p.value < 0.001, "< .001", 
                     paste0("= ", round(cit_inc_chi$p.value, 3)))
    )
  )

cit_inc_table

gtsave(cit_inc_table,
       "../../statistical_report/cit_inc_table.png")
```

### 4. Chi square: citizenship : income

```{r}
race_cit_chi <- acs_design %>% 
  svychisq(formula = ~ race_simp + cit_simp,
           design = .,
           statistic = "Chisq",
           na.rm = TRUE)

race_cit_chi

race_cit_table <- race_cit_chi$observed %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  group_by(cit_simp, race_simp) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    race_simp = factor(race_simp,
                       levels = c("Hispanic", "White", "Black", "Asian", "Other"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(race_simp) %>%
  mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n), 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-n) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = cit_simp,
              values_from = prop) %>%
  arrange(race_simp) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "race_simp") %>% 
  tab_header(title = "Table 8: Chi-square: Race and Citizenship") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Race") %>% 
  tab_spanner(label = "Citizenship",
              columns = everything()) %>% 
  data_color(
    columns = 1,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#4daf4a")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = 2,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#377eb8")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = 3,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#984ea3")
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste0(
      "χ² = ", round(race_cit_chi$statistic, 2),
      ", p ", ifelse(race_cit_chi$p.value < 0.001, "< .001", 
                     paste0("= ", round(race_cit_chi$p.value, 3)))
    )
  )

race_cit_table

gtsave(race_cit_table,
       "../../statistical_report/race_cit_table.png")
```

### 5. Chi square: race : education

```{r}
race_edu_chi <- acs_design %>% 
  svychisq(formula = ~ race_simp + education,
           design = .,
           statistic = "Chisq",
           na.rm = TRUE)

race_edu_table <- race_edu_chi$observed %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  group_by(education) %>% 
  mutate(prop = round(n / sum (n), 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-n) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = race_simp, values_from = prop) %>% 
  mutate(education = factor(education,
                            levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                                       "Doctorate degree",
                                       "Master's degree",
                                       "Bachelor's degree",
                                       "Associate's degree",
                                       "Some college",
                                       "Regular high school diploma",
                                       "GED or alternative credential",
                                       "Less than High School",
                                       "No schooling completed"))) %>% 
  arrange(education) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(education, Hispanic, White, Black, Asian, Other) %>% 
  gt(rowname_col = "education") %>% 
  tab_header(title = "Table 6: Chi-square: Race and Education") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Education") %>% 
  tab_spanner(label = "Race",
              columns = everything()) %>% 
  data_color(
    columns = Hispanic,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#4daf4a")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = White,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#377eb8")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = Black,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#984ea3")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = Asian,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#e41a1c")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = Other,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#ff7f00")) %>% 
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste0(
      "χ² = ", round(race_edu_chi$statistic, 2),
      ", p ", ifelse(race_edu_chi$p.value < 0.001, "< .001", 
                     paste0("= ", round(race_edu_chi$p.value, 3)))
    )
  )

race_edu_table

gtsave(race_edu_table,
       "../../statistical_report/race_edu_table.png")
```

### chi square education : citizenship

```{r}

cit_edu_chi <- acs_design %>% 
  svychisq(formula = ~ cit_simp + education,
           design = .,
           statistic = "Chisq",
           na.rm = TRUE)


cit_edu_table <- cit_edu_chi$observed %>% 
  as_tibble() %>%
  group_by(cit_simp, education) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    education = factor(education,
                       levels = c("Post-bacc professional degree",
                                  "Doctorate degree",
                                  "Master's degree",
                                  "Bachelor's degree",
                                  "Associate's degree",
                                  "Some college",
                                  "Regular high school diploma",
                                  "GED or alternative credential",
                                  "Less than High School"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(cit_simp) %>%
  mutate(prop = round(n / sum(n), 2)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-n) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = cit_simp,
              values_from = prop) %>%
  arrange(education) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(education, everything()) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "education") %>% 
  tab_header(title = "Table 9: Chi-square: Education and Citizenship") %>% 
  tab_stubhead(label = "Education") %>% 
  tab_spanner(label = "Citizenship",
              columns = everything()) %>% 
  data_color(
    columns = 1,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#4daf4a")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = 2,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#377eb8")
  ) %>%
  data_color(
    columns = 3,
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("white", "#984ea3")
  ) %>%
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = paste0(
      "χ² = ", round(cit_edu_chi$statistic, 2),
      ", p ", ifelse(cit_edu_chi$p.value < 0.001, "< .001", 
                     paste0("= ", round(cit_edu_chi$p.value, 3)))
    )
  )

cit_edu_table

gtsave(cit_edu_table,
       "../../statistical_report/cit_edu_table.png")
```
